chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3010 of 2023 Abdul Ahad Versus Rehana Begum & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 22.04.2024 None present. -.-.- This petition is being fixed for its maintainability since last few dates and petitioner and/or his counsel is not appearing and assisting this Court. They were called absent on 05.10.2023 followed by their absence on 19.01.2024. Position today is same and there is no intimation either. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
